spdx:CERN Open Hardware Licence Version 2 - Weakly Reciprocal
Create a text file (typically named LICENSE or LICENSE.txt) in the root of your
source code and copy the text of the license into the file.
Permissions of this weakly-reciprocal license are conditioned on making
available complete sources of licensed works and modifications under the same
license. Notices must be preserved. Contributors provide an express grant of
patent rights. However, a larger work using the licensed work through interfaces
provided by the licensed work may be distributed under different terms and
without sources for the larger work.
CERN Open Hardware Licence Weakly Reciprocal 2.0
